Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x93F2 "POSTERPASTER-C000-93F2" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $c000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Poster Paster.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added a routine at $C000 to set $FF = $20 to ensure the game runs correctly (without this, the options screen is not displayed for the correct amount of time before returning to the title screen).
